rules.invalidBrace: Template contains invalid "{" placeholders. Use {paramName} only (ASCII identifier matching declared parameters).

invalidJson.title: Configuration file could not be parsed
invalidJson.description: Showing built-in defaults. Saving will write a valid JSON file.

reset.title: Confirm reset
reset.content: Restore built-in defaults; unsaved edits will be lost. Click Save to persist.

save.title: Confirm save
save.content: Write current templates to the server. Continue?

dev.persistPath: Dev note: persisted at project root data/promptConfig.json (directory is in .gitignore).

contextSummarySystem.name: Summary generation
contextSummarySystem.desc: Background system prompt used when automatically refreshing rolling conversation summaries. Not used for direct user–model chat.

params.maxChars: Maximum character count for the summary (injected by the server).
params.messages: Multi-turn conversation body to summarize; injected at runtime by LangChain summarizationMiddleware—do not remove the placeholder.

contextSummarySystem.defaultValue:
You are a conversation summary assistant. The user will provide the full multi-turn conversation for the current session (overlap with the most recent messages sent separately in later chat requests is expected). Compress into one continuous summary in concise English. Preserve key facts, proper nouns, user constraints, and agreed decisions. Do not invent facts. Do not use markdown headings.

[Length] Total output must not exceed {maxChars} characters (typical string length, including punctuation and spaces). If you cannot cover everything within the limit, prioritize the most important information and finish naturally—avoid mid-sentence truncation. Do not output character counts or anything unrelated to the summary body.

[Conversation to summarize]
{messages}

summarySystemPrefix.name: Summary injection prefix
summarySystemPrefix.desc: When conversation content exceeds the recent N messages/tokens window, the server inserts a system summary message at the front of messages passed to the model to supplement understanding of earlier context. The summary is context-only; the message list in the UI still shows full originals.
summarySystemPrefix.defaultValue: Below is a summary of earlier content in this conversation for context (the message list in the UI still shows full originals):
